rch 14, 1997, the viewgraphs are available. 1997 Industrial Liaison Program Research Summary Book Architecture Trade Tool , released on January 29, 1997. RASSP Digest Newsletter. The book DSP Processor Fundamentals: Architectures and Feat

Processor Fundamentals: Architectures and Features , written by P. Lapsley, J. Bier, A. Shoham, and E. A. Lee, published by Berkeley Design Technology Inc. , is now available. The book Software Synthesis from Dataflow Graphs , wri

Software Synthesis from Dataflow Graphs , written by S. S. Bhattacharyya, P. K. Murthy, and E. A. Lee, published by Kluwer Academic Publishers is now available. The book reviews the state-of-the-art in Synchronous Dataflow scheduling

the-art in Synchronous Dataflow scheduling theory and develops scheduling algorithms for efficient code generation for programmable DSPs. Many of the algorithms described in the book have been implemented in Ptolemy. Related UC
ave been implemented in Ptolemy. Related UC Berkeley Research Last updated 02/25/99. Send comments to www@ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu .
